title: Soaring bond prices signal 'structural' shift and Bitcoin 'supercycle': Analyst
summary: Fixed-income investors are in a "panic" as government securities, once seen as low-risk, begin to crack, according to BitMEX researcher Shang Wu.

title: Buterin fires back at Ethereum Foundation critics, recommits to neutrality
summary: The Ethereum Foundation holds less than 1% of all ETH in circulation while other protocol foundations typically hold 10-50% of their native token's supply, the founder said.

title: Supertanker With Iraqi Crude Exits Persian Gulf Amid Talks
summary: A supertanker hauling Iraqi crude to China has left the Persian Gulf and crossed the US blockade line into the Arabian Sea, as talks continue to end the war between the US and Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Stocks Rise, Oil Falls on Iran Deal Expectations: Markets Wrap
summary: Asian stocks climbed and crude oil fell after US officials signaled that a deal with Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil flows may be near. The dollar weakened.

title: Now You Can Buy Bitcoin, XRP and More in ChatGPT via MoonPay
summary: MoonPay's new app lets users buy cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and Solana, through ChatGPT just by speaking with the chatbot.

title: Strategy Now Holds $65 Billion in Bitcoin—These Are Its Biggest BTC Buys
summary: How did Michael Saylor's firm amass a record stash of Bitcoin? Here's a look back at how Strategy made such massive gains.

title: NYT investigation alleges CFTC purged staff who questioned Trump-tied crypto firms
summary: Two officials who intervened to help three firms win approvals over staff objections, per the NYT, have since taken jobs at MoonPay and Gemini Titan.

title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum Foundation will be a ‘smaller ship,’ sell less ETH amid researcher exodus
summary: Buterin said the EF is choosing "longevity over breadth," selling less ETH and focusing exclusively on Ethereum's "CROPS" properties.

title: Trump says US will not ‘rush into a deal’ with Iran as talks continue
summary: Price of oil falls on hopes of an agreement that could reopen the Strait of Hormuz

title: Egypt deploys jets to UAE as Iran war strains Arab alliances
summary: Abu Dhabi had hit out at countries in region for not doing more to help defend against Iranian attacks
